race.comment: WINEACLOCKSUMWHERE (2) is a strong fresh performer looking to emulate his win at this track when kicking of off the last campaign. Kept improving after and was last seen recording an easy win in the rich Mt Barker sprint. Keeps Faithfull and is sure to be hard to roll. FLYING SOUTH (9) scored at Mt Barker two back then finished second, beaten one length, over 1230m at this track/grade at the latest appearance.  four weeks ago. Draws low today and off a brief freshen will be hard to stop. PLAYING RIO (5) dropped right out at Ascot, vet cleared and best to assess his chances on the 1.2L defeat over 1200m at Bunbury prior. Maps well, and the 2kg claim is handy. KHEAD'EM (7) was back to his best winning here this grade over 1100m. Worked home strong in that and can do the same here. LITTLE SILVER (1) resumes owning a trial win at the track. Usually needs one, but he has good ability and has a key gear switch.
